en: Do you have a particular field in mind? I do. For thousands of years,
ko: 특정 분야가 있나요? 있어요. 수천 년 동안,

en: the lowest classes of the human race
have spent their lives laboring to erect monuments
under the lash of their bettors,
and became one with the dust through which they trudged.
ko: 자신이 밟고 지나간 먼지와 하나가 되었습니다.

en: Do you have anything like that? No.
Shouldn't you check your database? No.
You didn't really type. I didn't really have to.
ko: 정말로 입력하지 않았네요. 그렇게 할 필요가 없었어요.

en: Just sawing, hammering, eating out of a lunch pail
as my working class fellows and I
sit perched precariously on a girder
ko: 높은 철골 위에 불안정하게 앉아 있습니다.

en: No, no, this is putting up sheetrock
at a housing project in Rosemeads. I could do that. I could do that.
ko: 로즈미드의 주택 프로젝트에서요. 그건 할 수 있어요. 그건 할 수 있어요.
